title: selaginella uncinata
intro: Selaginella uncinata, also known as Spike moss, is a type of small, delicate, and ancient plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella uncinata include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory disorders. Selaginella uncinata is often prepared as a tea or dried extract, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
